raw_title: Book Review: ‘Rabbit, Fox, Tar,’ by P.C. Verrone
description: In “Rabbit, Fox, Tar,” a white neighborhood’s local election is complicated when a mysterious, dark-skinned woman suddenly appears in town.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Girl’s Girl,’ by Sonia Feldman
description: In Sonia Feldman’s novel, “Girl’s Girl,” the delicate balance of a Gen Z friend group is unsettled over one Ohio summer.
